meta.launch_decision: Decide what to fix before opening a self-serve trial
assumptions: Only the pricing page was captured live; other surfaces reviewed as pasted text.

executive_summary.en: Acme Agent has a credible underlying workflow, but its English-market surface over-promises autonomy, under-explains data handling, and has accessibility gaps that will suppress trial conversion among cautious B2B buyers and expose the product on accessibility compliance. The strongest gaps are AI expectation-setting and trust/privacy at the first decision points. With scoped-capability language, a trust panel at the upload step, accessibility fixes, and outcome-specific CTAs, the product can reach trial-ready quality for this corridor.
executive_summary.zh: Acme Agent 的底层工作流可信，但面向英语市场的呈现过度承诺自主性、对数据处理说明不足，且存在无障碍缺陷，会抑制谨慎型 B2B 买家的试用转化并带来无障碍合规风险。最大的差距在于 AI 预期设定与首个决策点的信任/隐私。通过有界能力表述、在上传环节加入信任面板、修复无障碍问题、以及以结果为导向的行动按钮，产品可达到该走廊下的试用就绪水平。

score_explanation.en: Trust/privacy and AI expectation-setting weigh most heavily and score lowest, pulling the weighted total down; accessibility also scores below the bar. No unresolved Critical issues, so no cap is applied; medium confidence reflects partial evidence.
score_explanation.zh: 信任/隐私与 AI 预期设定权重最高且得分最低，拉低了加权总分；无障碍同样低于基准。无未解决的严重项，因此未触发封顶；中等置信度反映证据仅部分完整。

top_risks.en: Absolute autonomy claim ('handles the entire workflow') mismatches actual agent behavior and erodes buyer trust.
top_risks.zh: 绝对自主性表述（“处理整个工作流”）与智能体实际行为不符，削弱买家信任。

top_risks.en: Upload step asks for data before explaining storage, training, and retention.
top_risks.zh: 上传环节在未说明存储、训练与留存前即索取数据。

top_risks.en: Accessibility gaps (contrast, labels) risk excluding users and breach accessibility requirements in regulated markets.
top_risks.zh: 无障碍缺陷（对比度、标签）可能将部分用户排除在外，并在受监管市场违反无障碍要求。

issues.original_text: The AI agent handles the entire workflow for you.

problem.en: Implies full autonomy and does not define what the agent decides, drafts, escalates, or what requires human approval.
problem.zh: 暗示完全自主，未界定智能体可决策、起草、上报的范围，以及哪些需人工审批。

why_it_matters.en: Cross-border buyers are cautious about delegating decisions to an unfamiliar AI provider; an absolute claim creates an expectation/behavior mismatch and reduces trust.
why_it_matters.zh: 跨境买家对将决策交给陌生 AI 供应商持谨慎态度；绝对表述造成预期与行为不符并降低信任。

recommendation.en: Replace the absolute claim with scoped-capability language; show the review queue, approval path, fallback, and escalation behavior.
recommendation.zh: 用有界能力表述替代绝对表述；展示审核队列、审批路径、回退与上报机制。

issues.rewritten_version: The AI agent drafts recommendations, highlights risk areas, and prepares a review queue so your team can approve final copy and market decisions.

target_market_note.en: Autonomy claims should be tied to accountability, visible control, and an operational fallback path.
target_market_note.zh: 自主性表述应与问责、可见的控制权及可运行的回退路径绑定。

problem.en: The upload flow requests content without explaining data use, storage, training, retention, or deletion.
problem.zh: 上传流程索取内容，却未说明数据用途、存储、训练、留存或删除。

why_it_matters.en: Without a trust signal at the decision point, cautious buyers abandon before uploading, and the AI's value is never demonstrated.
why_it_matters.zh: 决策点缺乏信任信号，谨慎买家会在上传前放弃，AI 的价值无从展示。

recommendation.en: Place a compact trust panel at the upload point covering data use, storage, training policy, retention, deletion, and any review requirements.
recommendation.zh: 在上传点放置紧凑的信任面板，涵盖数据用途、存储、训练政策、留存、删除及任何审核要求。

issues.rewritten_version: Your files are processed to generate the review and are not used to train models. Stored encrypted; deleted on request. See data handling.

target_market_note.en: English-global buyers expect explicit model-training, retention, and provider handling before sharing data.
target_market_note.zh: 英语全球买家在共享数据前，期望明确的模型训练、留存与供应商处理说明。

problem.en: The CTA offers no concrete outcome and adds friction for a self-serve audience.
problem.zh: 该行动按钮未提供具体结果，对自助型受众增加了摩擦。

why_it_matters.en: Vague CTAs depress conversion despite strong traffic; self-serve buyers want a low-risk, concrete next step.
why_it_matters.zh: 通用按钮即便在高流量下也会压低转化；自助买家需要低风险、具体的下一步。

recommendation.en: Offer a concrete outcome such as a scoped sample review or a guided trial.
recommendation.zh: 提供具体结果，如范围明确的样例评审或引导式试用。

issues.rewritten_version: Run a free sample review on one of your own files.

target_market_note.en: Workflow-first, outcome-led CTAs convert better than AI-first slogans in this corridor.
target_market_note.zh: 在该走廊下，以工作流和结果为导向的按钮比 AI 口号更能转化。

standard_refs: Nielsen #2: Match between system and the real world

issues.original_text: Our intelligent platform lets you go global instantly with one-click smart automation.

problem.en: Buzzword-dense, source-market-style AI copy ('intelligent platform', 'smart automation', 'instantly') reads as machine-translated and immature to the target category.
problem.zh: 堆砌流行词、带源市场风格的 AI 文案（“智能平台”“智能自动化”“瞬间”）在目标品类中读起来像机器翻译且不够成熟。

why_it_matters.en: Broad translated AI-benefit language makes a credible product feel untrustworthy to category-literate buyers.
why_it_matters.zh: 宽泛的翻译式 AI 收益话术会让本可信的产品在懂行买家眼中显得不可信。

recommendation.en: Name the workflow, input, output, user control, and limitation in target-market-native product language; cut unsupported absolutes.
recommendation.zh: 用目标市场地道的产品语言写清工作流、输入、输出、用户控制与限制；删除无支撑的绝对表述。

issues.rewritten_version: Localize and pressure-test your product copy for a target market, then export a prioritized fix list your team can ship.

target_market_note.en: Scored with an MQM-style lens: terminology and style errors at major severity, plus an MQM-Chat buzzword/loanword flag.
target_market_note.zh: 采用 MQM 视角评估：术语与风格属重度错误，并标记 MQM-Chat 的流行词/借词问题。

issues.original_text: Primary CTA: light-grey text (#9AA0A6) on white; icon-only buttons in the upload toolbar with no text labels.

problem.en: Low text contrast and unlabeled icon-only controls fail WCAG 2.1 AA (1.4.3 Contrast, 4.1.2 Name/Role/Value), blocking low-vision and screen-reader users.
problem.zh: 文本对比度过低、仅图标且无标签的控件不满足 WCAG 2.1 AA（1.4.3 对比度、4.1.2 名称/角色/值），阻碍低视力与读屏用户。

why_it_matters.en: Beyond excluding users, accessibility is legally required in several target markets (e.g. EU EN 301 549, US ADA/Section 508); gaps risk complaints, fines, and lost enterprise deals.
why_it_matters.zh: 除排除用户外，无障碍在多个目标市场是法律要求（如欧盟 EN 301 549、美国 ADA/Section 508）；缺陷可能招致投诉、罚款并失去企业合同。

recommendation.en: Raise text contrast to >=4.5:1, add visible text labels (or accessible names) to icon-only controls, and run a WCAG 2.1 AA pass with assistive tech.
recommendation.zh: 将文本对比度提升至 >=4.5:1，为仅图标控件添加可见文本标签（或可访问名称），并用辅助技术做一次 WCAG 2.1 AA 检查。

issues.rewritten_version: Primary CTA: #1A1A1A on white (contrast 16:1); upload buttons labeled 'Upload file', 'Replace', 'Remove'.

target_market_note.en: For any EU-facing corridor, treat WCAG 2.1 AA as the EN 301 549 / EAA baseline and flag for accessibility-compliance review.
target_market_note.zh: 对任何面向欧盟的走廊，将 WCAG 2.1 AA 视为 EN 301 549 / EAA 基线，并提交无障碍合规复核。

task.en: Define AI-agent capability boundaries and escalation language across the landing page and onboarding.
task.zh: 在落地页与引导流程中界定智能体能力边界与上报语言。

task.en: Add a trust panel at the upload decision point (data use, training, retention, deletion).
task.zh: 在上传决策点加入信任面板（数据用途、训练、留存、删除）。

task.en: Fix WCAG 2.1 AA contrast and add accessible names to icon-only controls.
task.zh: 修复 WCAG 2.1 AA 对比度，并为仅图标控件添加可访问名称。

task.en: Replace generic CTAs with outcome-specific actions across primary pages.
task.zh: 在主要页面将通用按钮替换为以结果为导向的具体动作。

task.en: Rewrite buzzword-dense hero copy into native, workflow-first product language.
task.zh: 将堆砌流行词的首屏文案改写为地道、以工作流为先的产品语言。

reason.en: Cross-border processing of uploaded customer content and model-provider data handling should be reviewed by a qualified privacy expert before launch.
reason.zh: 上传客户内容的跨境处理及模型供应商的数据处理，应在上线前由合格的隐私专家复核。

reason.en: Accessibility gaps may create legal exposure in regulated markets; a qualified accessibility specialist should run a full conformance audit, especially for EU-facing corridors under the European Accessibility Act.
reason.zh: 无障碍缺陷可能在受监管市场带来法律风险；应由合格的无障碍专家进行完整合规审计，尤其针对受《欧洲无障碍法案》约束的面向欧盟走廊。

next_steps.en: Resolve P1 agent-boundary, trust-panel, and accessibility items, then re-audit after copy and onboarding updates.
next_steps.zh: 先解决 P1 的智能体边界、信任面板与无障碍项，待文案与引导更新后重新审计。

next_steps.en: Send the privacy/data-transfer and accessibility-compliance items to qualified local experts before launch.
next_steps.zh: 在上线前将隐私/数据跨境与无障碍合规项交由合格的本地专家。

next_steps.en: Re-run with compare_audits.py against this version to track score and finding deltas.
next_steps.zh: 用 compare_audits.py 与此版本对比，跟踪分数与发现项的变化。

limitations.en: This audit is primarily text-driven; only the pricing page was captured live (Level-2), other surfaces were reviewed as pasted text (Level-1). Full live behavior, analytics, and deeper flows were not available, so behavior-level conclusions are limited. The score is a heuristic summary computed by a deterministic rubric over expert-judged per-dimension scores, not a certification or guarantee. Playbook rules are working hypotheses requiring local validation. Findings are cross-walked to external standards (NIST AI RMF, ISO 42001, MQM, WCAG/EN 301 549) for grounding, not as a compliance opinion. AI-assisted findings require human verification before client delivery.
limitations.zh: 本审计以文本为主；仅对定价页做了实时采集（L2），其他界面以粘贴文本审阅（L1）。完整实时行为、分析数据与更深流程不可得，故行为层结论有限。评分由确定性规则对专家判定的各维度分值计算而得，是启发式概览，并非认证或保证。playbook 规则为待验证的工作假设。发现项交叉对照外部标准（NIST AI RMF、ISO 42001、MQM、WCAG/EN 301 549）以增强依据，但不构成合规意见。AI 辅助发现在交付客户前需人工核验。
